items.title: Nepalis vote in first election since Gen Z uprising for change
items.description: This election will test whether the country is ready for a new, untested generation to shape its future.

items.title: Timelapse shows change in the flow of ships in the Strait of Hormuz
items.description: A timelapse of marine traffic shows the flow of ships has decreased in the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Ethiopia experiments with 'smart' police stations that have no officers
items.description: A project to introduce unmanned sites is part of a broader adoption of digital technologies.

items.title: Texas lawmaker admits 'lapse in judgement' in affair with aide
items.description: The admission from the married Republican, Tony Gonzales, comes after a House panel launched an ethics investigation.

items.title: DR Congo government says 200 killed after landslide at rebel-held mine
items.description: The M23, which controls the coltan-rich area, has not commented and the death toll is hard to verify.
